[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001100 2
1 00101101 4
2 11111001 6
3 00111001 4
4 11000110 4
5 01000100 2
6 00001100 2
7 01100000 2

01 10 00000000 a
12 21 00000000 a
23 32 00000000 a
34 43 01000100 2 match 5
45 54 00000100 1
56 65 00000000 a
67 76 01100000 2 match 7
70 07 01001001 3

02 20 00001001 2
13 31 00000000 a
24 42 00000000 a
35 53 00000100 1
46 64 01000000 1
57 75 00001000 1
60 06 01000000 1
71 17 00000000 a

03 30 01000100 2 match 5
14 41 00000000 a
25 52 00001000 1
36 63 01000000 1
47 74 01000000 1
50 05 00001100 2 match 0 6
61 16 00000000 a
72 27 00111001 4 match 3

04 40 01000100 2 match 5
15 51 00000000 a
26 62 00100000 1
37 73 11000000 2
